sourcesContent:
import { useEffect, useState } from "react" export default function Dashboard() { const [bins, setBins] = useState([]) const [stats, setStats] = useState({ totalBins: 0, collected: 0, overflow: 0 }) useEffect(() => { fetch("http://127.0.0.1:5000/bins") .then(res => res.json()) .then(data => { setBins(data) const total = data.length const overflow = data.filter(b => b.Waste_Level > 80).length const collected = total - overflow setStats({ totalBins: total, collected, overflow }) }) }, []) return (

📊 Smart Waste Dashboard

{/* 🔥 CARDS */}

Total Bins

{stats.totalBins}

Collected

{stats.collected}

Overflow

{stats.overflow}

{/* 🚨 ALERTS */}

⚠ Live Alerts

{bins .filter(b => b.Waste_Level > 80) .slice(0, 5) .map(b => (
🚨 Bin {b.Bin_ID} in {b.Area} ({b.Waste_Level}%)
)) } {/* 📋 TABLE */}

📍 Bin Status

{bins.map(b => ( ))}
Bin ID Area Waste Level
{b.Bin_ID} {b.Area} {b.Waste_Level}%
) }
